S.FORM: = Pranab Mukherjee = Mntucing hngkawas 1935 idas 12 jiyax 11 ka Pranab Mukherjee ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan India ta sayang o kiya ka Pranab Mukherjee, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 7 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan india ta sajaŋ o kija ka pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Pranab Mukherjee = Mntucing hngkawas 1935 idas 12 jiyax 11 ka Pranab Mukherjee ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan India ta sayang o kiya ka Pranab Mukherjee, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 7 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan india ta sajaŋ o kija ka pɾanab mukħəɾɟəə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
